hooks.name: session-start
hooks.description: Injects OMA orchestration context and restores active mode from .oma/state.json on session start

hooks.name: delegation-enforce
hooks.description: Blocks direct file edits (Edit, Write, remove_files) when OMA orchestration mode is active. Enforces delegation to oma-executor.

hooks.name: stop-gate
hooks.description: Blocks agent completion when ralph mode is active and oma-architect has not returned PASS verdict
